source: Captured from the TS loader (src/workflows parse/refine/flatten/inputs/recovery/steps) by .plans/extract-golden.ts. {REPO_ROOT} marks the temp repo root in error labels. Do not edit by hand; re-run the extractor instead.

cases.name: bad
cases.yaml:
inputs:
  target:
    options: [claude, ghost]
steps:
  - agent: "{input.target}"
cases.expected: bad.yaml, step 1, agent: input 'target' option 'ghost' is not a config agent

cases.name: wf

files.part:
inputs:
  x: {}
steps:
  - shell: cat
    stdin: "{input.x}"

cases.expected: wf.yaml, run: spliced workflow 'part' declares inputs — declare them on the entry workflow

cases.name: bad
cases.yaml:
inputs:
  target:
    options: agents
steps:
  - agent: "{input.target}"
cases.expected: bad.yaml, inputs.target: options: agents but no agents configured

cases.name: bad
cases.yaml:
inputs:
  target:
    options: [a, b]
    default: c
steps:
  - shell: cat
    stdin: "{input.target}"
cases.expected: bad.yaml, inputs.target: default 'c' not in options

cases.name: bad
cases.yaml:
inputs:
  branch:
    options: "exit 1"
steps:
  - shell: cat
    stdin: "{input.branch}"
cases.expected: bad.yaml, inputs.branch: options command failed: exit 1

cases.name: bad
cases.yaml:
inputs:
  branch:
    options: "true"
steps:
  - shell: cat
    stdin: "{input.branch}"
cases.expected: bad.yaml, inputs.branch: options command produced no choices

cases.name: bad
cases.yaml:
inputs:
  branch:
    options: "printf 'main\n'"
    default: other
steps:
  - shell: cat
    stdin: "{input.branch}"
cases.expected: bad.yaml, inputs.branch: default 'other' not in options
